product: Upcoming breaking change: default behavior when deleting a Unity Catalog…
tagline: In an upcoming release, the default behavior when deleting a Unity Catalog pipeline will change.
what_it_does: In an upcoming release, the default behavior when deleting a Unity Catalog pipeline will change. Currently, deleting a pipeline also removes all associated materialized views, streaming tables, and views. After this change, associated tables will be retained, but inactive after the pipeline is removed.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: In an upcoming release, the default behavior when deleting a Unity Catalog pipeline will change. Currently, deleting a pipeline also removes all associated materialized views, streaming tables, and views.
key_takeaway: In an upcoming release, the default behavior when deleting a Unity Catalog pipeline will change.
